evidence_role_summary.summary: model-selection and internal-only model-comparison evidence remain diagnostic and proxy-limited
the held-out split is deterministic, disjoint, and documented for contact/trajectory validation
no calibration dataset or parameter-fitting record is introduced by this manifest
this is contact/trajectory validation only, not a physical probability dataset
this is not operational hazard evidence

fixture_boundaries.proxy_boundary_note: segment boundaries are contact/rebound proxies, not direct impact sensors

limitations: held-out contact evidence does not validate Tschamut hazard maps
held-out contact evidence does not establish annual or physical probability
it is contact / trajectory evidence, not full Swiss-wide hazard-map validation

metrics_summary.contact_proxies: Held-out model-comparison fixture only. Uses 15 reconstructed flight segments and 9 segment-boundary contact/rebound proxies from six public Chant Sura trajectories not used in the model-selection contact subset.

selection_boundary_notes: held-out trajectories are disjoint from the model-selection subset
segment boundaries remain contact/rebound proxies inferred from local time resets
the split metadata is deterministic and explicit

limitations: held-out contact evidence does not validate Tschamut hazard maps
held-out contact evidence does not establish annual or physical probability
it is contact / trajectory evidence, not full Swiss-wide hazard-map validation
the current split is deterministic and compact, not statistically powered
segment boundaries are proxy events inferred from local time resets
no calibration or parameter tuning is introduced by this manifest
model-selection evidence is diagnostic and not independent holdout validation
shape mapping remains proxy-only and unresolved
selection_summaries: model-selection subset is used to compare candidate contact-model options before the held-out evaluation
the internal model-selection fixture is explicitly internal-only and proxy-only for EOTA shape assignment

overlap_check.interpretation: no shared trajectory IDs between model-selection and held-out subsets

recommended_next_evidence_step: Use this manifest as the holdout boundary reference for contact/trajectory generalization; if broader validation is needed, stage a separate independent benchmark rather than reusing these fixtures.

split_metadata.calibration_policy: No calibration data or parameter tuning are used in this split.

held_out_evaluation_subset.role: Internal disjoint trajectory-level holdout for the contact-model recommendation; it is not an external independent validation dataset.

model_selection_subset.role: Used to compare candidate contact-model options before the internal disjoint holdout evaluation.

selection_constraints: No trajectory ID overlap between model-selection and held-out subsets.
Held-out trajectories include W200 and W800 mass classes where available inside the RF16 DEM crop.
All included segments have at least 90% of samples inside the RF16 DEM crop.
Segment boundaries remain contact/rebound proxies, not direct instrumented impacts.
split_metadata.split_method: Deterministic trajectory-level split constrained to trajectories with early local-time-reset segments inside the checked-in RF16 DEM crop.
